name: python3-status
title: python3-status
description:
HTTP Status for Humans (Python 3)
This package contains very simple Python library which provides human
understandable HTTP status codes and improves readability of your code. You
don't have to use those ugly HTTP status numbers, but use easily
understandable status names.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-status because HTTP Status for Humans (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-status as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-status with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-status --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
